message.content:
Implement the following plan:

# Tech Spec: DevPod Workspace on cafehyna-dev

## Context

The team needs a cloud-based development environment on `cafehyna-dev` with Claude Code and a full DevOps toolstack. The `TODO.md` tracks this as "create a entirely devpod".

**Critical finding**: DevPod.sh is a **client-only tool** — it has no server component or Helm chart. The solution is a **code-server deployment** (browser-based VS Code) with SSH access, deployed as raw Kubernetes manifests via ArgoCD's directory source pattern (same pattern used by `defectdojo.yaml` Source 3).

---

## Files to Create

| # | File | Purpose |
|---|------|---------|
| 1 | `infra-team/applicationset/devpod.yaml` | ApplicationSet definition (directory source, not Helm) |
| 2 | `argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/cafehyna-dev/deployment.yaml` | code-server Deployment with SSH sidecar |
| 3 | `argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/cafehyna-dev/pvc.yaml` | 50Gi PersistentVolumeClaim |
| 4 | `argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/cafehyna-dev/service-web.yaml` | ClusterIP for code-server (port 8080) |
| 5 | `argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/cafehyna-dev/service-ssh.yaml` | ClusterIP for SSH (port 2222) |
| 6 | `argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/cafehyna-dev/ingress.yaml` | Ingress for web IDE with WebSocket support |
| 7 | `argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/cafehyna-dev/kustomization.yaml` | Kustomize resource list for the directory |
| 8 | `argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/cafehyna-dev/secretproviderclass.yaml` | Azure Key Vault CSI for ANTHROPIC_API_KEY |
| 9 | `argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/Dockerfile` | Custom workspace image (for ACR build, excluded from sync) |

## Files to Modify

| # | File | Change |
|---|------|--------|
| 1 | `infra-team/applicationset/kustomization.yaml` | Add `- devpod.yaml` to resources |

---

## Step 1: Custom Container Image (Dockerfile)

Build and push to ACR **before** deploying manifests. Based on `codercom/code-server:latest` with:

- **SSH server** (openssh-server, port 2222)
- **Cloud tools**: az cli, terraform
- **K8s tools**: kubectl, helm, kustomize, k9s, argocd cli
- **Dev tools**: git, jq, yq, pre-commit, Node.js 22
- **Claude Code**: `npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code`
- **VS Code extensions**: YAML, Kubernetes, Terraform, Docker

```bash
# Build command (run from argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/)
az acr build --registry cafehynadevhlg --image devpod-workspace:1.0.0 -f Dockerfile .
```

---

## Step 2: ApplicationSet (`infra-team/applicationset/devpod.yaml`)

Uses **directory source** pattern from `defectdojo.yaml` Source 3 — no Helm chart:

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ApplicationSet
metadata:
  name: devpod
  namespace: argocd
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: kube-addons
    app.kubernetes.io/component: developer-tools
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: argocd
    cafehyna.com.br/lifecycle: active
    cafehyna.com.br/managed-via: kustomization
  annotations:
    argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "5"
    cafehyna.com.br/owner-team: platform-engineering
spec:
  syncPolicy:
    preserveResourcesOnDeletion: true
  generators:
    - list:
        elements:
          - cluster: cafehyna-dev
            url: https://aks-cafehyna-dev-hlg-q3oga63c.30041054-9b14-4852-9bd5-114d2fac4590.privatelink.eastus.azmk8s.io:443
            project: kube-addons
            branch: main
            environment: development
            urlSuffix: .dev
  template:
    metadata:
      name: "{{cluster}}-devpod"
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: "{{cluster}}-devpod"
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: "{{cluster}}-kube-addons"
        app.kubernetes.io/component: developer-tools
        app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: argocd
        environment: "{{environment}}"
      annotations:
        argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "5"
        notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-health-degraded.slack: argocd-alerts
        notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-sync-failed.slack: argocd-alerts
    spec:
      revisionHistoryLimit: 10
      project: "{{project}}"
      sources:
        # Single source: raw manifests from directory
        - repoURL: https://hyperadevops@dev.azure.com/hyperadevops/devops-team/_git/argocd
          targetRevision: "{{branch}}"
          path: argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/{{cluster}}
          directory:
            exclude: "{Dockerfile,README.md,*.bak}"
      destination:
        server: "{{url}}"
        namespace: devpod
      info:
        - name: DevPod Web IDE
          value: https://devpod{{urlSuffix}}.cafehyna.com.br
        - name: SSH Access
          value: "kubectl port-forward -n devpod svc/devpod-ssh 2222:22"
        - name: Documentation
          value: https://coder.com/docs/code-server
      ignoreDifferences:
        - group: ""
          kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
          jsonPointers:
            - /status
            - /spec/volumeName
        - group: ""
          kind: Service
          jsonPointers:
            - /spec/clusterIP
            - /spec/clusterIPs
      syncPolicy:
        automated:
          prune: true
          selfHeal: true
          allowEmpty: false
        retry:
          limit: 5
          backoff:
            duration: 5s
            factor: 2
            maxDuration: 3m
        syncOptions:
          - ServerSideApply=true
          - PrunePropagationPolicy=Orphan
          - PruneLast=true
          - Validate=true
          - ApplyOutOfSyncOnly=true
          - RespectIgnoreDifferences=true
          - CreateNamespace=true
        managedNamespaceMetadata:
          labels:
            managed-by: argocd
            purpose: developer-tools
          annotations:
            support-team: platform-engineering
            criticality: medium
```

---

## Step 3: Kubernetes Manifests

### deployment.yaml

Key decisions (from sonarqube cafehyna-dev pattern):
- **Spot tolerations**: `kubernetes.azure.com/scalesetpriority=spot` + `CriticalAddonsOnly`
- **Node affinity**: required on `agentpool=cafedevspot`, preferred on spot
- **Strategy**: `Recreate` (single replica, avoid PVC multi-attach)
- **Resources**: requests 2 CPU / 4Gi, limits 4 CPU / 8Gi
- **Ports**: 8080 (code-server), 2222 (SSH)
- **Volume**: 50Gi PVC at `/home/coder/workspace`
- **Env**: `TZ=America/Sao_Paulo`, `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` from Secret

```yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: devpod-workspace
  namespace: devpod
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
    app.kubernetes.io/component: workspace
spec:
  replicas: 1
  strategy:
    type: Recreate
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
        app.kubernetes.io/component: workspace
    spec:
      tolerations:
        - key: kubernetes.azure.com/scalesetpriority
          operator: Equal
          value: "spot"
          effect: NoSchedule
        - key: "CriticalAddonsOnly"
          operator: "Exists"
          effect: "NoSchedule"
      affinity:
        nodeAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            - weight: 100
              preference:
                matchExpressions:
                  - key: kubernetes.azure.com/scalesetpriority
                    operator: In
                    values: ["spot"]
          requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            nodeSelectorTerms:
              - matchExpressions:
                  - key: agentpool
                    operator: In
                    values: ["cafedevspot"]
      containers:
        - name: code-server
          image: cafehynadevhlg.azurecr.io/devpod-workspace:1.0.0
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
            - name: ssh
              containerPort: 2222
          env:
            - name: TZ
              value: America/Sao_Paulo
            - name: PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: devpod-secrets
                  key: code-server-password
                  optional: true
            - name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: devpod-akv-secrets
                  key: anthropic-api-key
                  optional: true
          volumeMounts:
            - name: workspace
              mountPath: /home/coder/workspace
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "2"
              memory: 4Gi
            limits:
              cpu: "4"
              memory: 8Gi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 30
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
      volumes:
        - name: workspace
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: devpod-workspace
```

### pvc.yaml

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: devpod-workspace
  namespace: devpod
spec:
  accessModes: [ReadWriteOnce]
  storageClassName: managed-premium-zrs
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 50Gi
```

### service-web.yaml

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: devpod-web
  namespace: devpod
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
```

### service-ssh.yaml

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: devpod-ssh
  namespace: devpod
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
  ports:
    - name: ssh
      port: 22
      targetPort: 2222
```

### ingress.yaml

WebSocket support required for code-server (following sonarqube ingress pattern):

```yaml
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: devpod-web
  namespace: devpod
  annotations:
    kubernetes.io/ingress.class: "nginx"
    cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: "letsencrypt-staging-cloudflare"
    cert-manager.io/subject-organizations: "Hypera Pharma"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-read-timeout: "3600"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-send-timeout: "3600"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-body-size: "500m"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-http-version: "1.1"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/configuration-snippet: |
      proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
      proxy_set_header Connection "upgrade";
spec:
  tls:
    - hosts:
        - devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br
  rules:
    - host: devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: devpod-web
                port:
                  number: 8080
```

### kustomization.yaml

```yaml
apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
  - deployment.yaml
  - pvc.yaml
  - service-web.yaml
  - service-ssh.yaml
  - ingress.yaml
  - secretproviderclass.yaml
```

---

## Step 4: Register in Kustomization

Add `- devpod.yaml` to `infra-team/applicationset/kustomization.yaml` resources list.

---

## Step 5: Access Methods

| Method | How |
|--------|-----|
| **Web IDE** | `https://devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br` — code-server with password auth |
| **SSH (local IDE)** | `kubectl port-forward -n devpod svc/devpod-ssh 2222:22` then `ssh -p 2222 coder@localhost` |
| **VS Code Remote** | SSH extension pointing at `localhost:2222` after port-forward |

---

## Implementation Order

1. **Create Dockerfile** and build/push to ACR
2. **Create manifest directory** `argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/cafehyna-dev/`
3. **Create all K8s manifests** (deployment, pvc, services, ingress, kustomization)
4. **Create ApplicationSet** `infra-team/applicationset/devpod.yaml`
5. **Update kustomization.yaml** to include devpod.yaml
6. **Run pre-commit** `pre-commit run --all-files`
7. **Commit and push**

---

## Verification

1. ArgoCD UI: `cafehyna-dev-devpod` app shows **Synced + Healthy**
2. `kubectl get pods -n devpod` — pod Running
3. `kubectl get pvc -n devpod` — PVC Bound (50Gi)
4. Web IDE: navigate to `https://devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br`
5. SSH: `kubectl port-forward -n devpod svc/devpod-ssh 2222:22` then connect
6. Tool check inside pod:
   ```bash
   az version && kubectl version --client && helm version && \
   terraform version && argocd version --client && kustomize version && \
   k9s version && jq --version && yq --version && pre-commit --version && \
   claude --version
   ```
7. Persistence: delete pod, wait for recreation, verify `/home/coder/workspace` data survived

---

## Resolved Decisions

- **ACR**: `cafehynadevhlg.azurecr.io`
- **DNS**: `devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br`
- **Auth (web)**: code-server password auth initially
- **Claude Code API key**: Azure Key Vault CSI via SecretProviderClass from `kv-cafehyna-dev-hlg`
  - Add `secretproviderclass.yaml` to mount `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` as K8s Secret
  - Reference in Deployment env via `secretKeyRef`

---

## Reference Files Used

- `infra-team/applicationset/defectdojo.yaml` — directory source pattern (Source 3)
- `infra-team/applicationset/adminer.yaml` — minimal ApplicationSet pattern
- `argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/sonarqube/cafehyna-dev/values.yaml` — spot tolerations, nodeAffinity, ingress, cert-manager annotations
- `infra-team/applicationset/TEMPLATE.yaml` — standard labels, annotations, syncPolicy
- `infra-team/argocd-clusters/cafehyna-dev.yaml` — cluster URL, nodepool info


If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /Users/juliano.barbosa/.claude/projects/-Users-juliano-barbosa-Repos-azure-rg-hypera-cafehyna-web-Repos-dev-src-argocd--claude-worktrees-argocd-app-websites-wip/45984b85-538f-43fa-8047-65f5b2e76c9f.jsonl

If this plan can be broken down into multiple independent tasks, consider using the TeamCreate tool to create a team and parallelize the work.

```yaml
metadata:
  name: devpod-web
  namespace: devpod
  annotations:
    kubernetes.io/ingress.class: "nginx"
    cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: "letsencrypt-staging-cloudflare"
    cert-manager.io/subject-organizations: "Hypera Pharma"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-read-timeout: "3600"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-send-timeout: "3600"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-body-size: "500m"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-http-version: "1.1"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/configuration-snippet: |
      proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
      proxy_set_header Connection "upgrade";
spec:
  tls:
    - hosts:
        - devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br
  rules:
    - host: devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: devpod-web
                port:
                  number: 8080
```

### kustomization.yaml

```yaml
apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
  - deployment.yaml
  - pvc.yaml
  - service-web.yaml
  - service-ssh.yaml
  - ingress.yaml
  - secretproviderclass.yaml
```

---

## Step 4: Register in Kustomization

Add `- devpod.yaml` to `infra-team/applicationset/kustomization.yaml` resources list.

---

## Step 5: Access Methods

| Method | How |
|--------|-----|
| **Web IDE** | `https://devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br` — code-server with password auth |
| **SSH (local IDE)** | `kubectl port-forward -n devpod svc/devpod-ssh 2222:22` then `ssh -p 2222 coder@localhost` |
| **VS Code Remote** | SSH extension pointing at `localhost:2222` after port-forward |

---

## Implementation Order

1. **Create Dockerfile** and build/push to ACR
2. **Create manifest directory** `argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/cafehyna-dev/`
3. **Create all K8s manifests** (deployment, pvc, services, ingress, kustomization)
4. **Create ApplicationSet** `infra-team/applicationset/devpod.yaml`
5. **Update kustomization.yaml** to include devpod.yaml
6. **Run pre-commit** `pre-commit run --all-files`
7. **Commit and push**

---

## Verification

1. ArgoCD UI: `cafehyna-dev-devpod` app shows **Synced + Healthy**
2. `kubectl get pods -n devpod` — pod Running
3. `kubectl get pvc -n devpod` — PVC Bound (50Gi)
4. Web IDE: navigate to `https://devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br`
5. SSH: `kubectl port-forward -n devpod svc/devpod-ssh 2222:22` then connect
6. Tool check inside pod:
   ```bash
   az version && kubectl version --client && helm version && \
   terraform version && argocd version --client && kustomize version && \
   k9s version && jq --version && yq --version && pre-commit --version && \
   claude --version
   ```
7. Persistence: delete pod, wait for recreation, verify `/home/coder/workspace` data survived

---

## Resolved Decisions

- **ACR**: `cafehynadevhlg.azurecr.io`
- **DNS**: `devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br`
- **Auth (web)**: code-server password auth initially
- **Claude Code API key**: Azure Key Vault CSI via SecretProviderClass from `kv-cafehyna-dev-hlg`
  - Add `secretproviderclass.yaml` to mount `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` as K8s Secret
  - Reference in Deployment env via `secretKeyRef`

---

## Reference Files Used

- `infra-team/applicationset/defectdojo.yaml` — directory source pattern (Source 3)
- `infra-team/applicationset/adminer.yaml` — minimal ApplicationSet pattern
- `argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/sonarqube/cafehyna-dev/values.yaml` — spot tolerations, nodeAffinity, ingress, cert-manager annotations
- `infra-team/applicationset/TEMPLATE.yaml` — standard labels, annotations, syncPolicy
- `infra-team/argocd-clusters/cafehyna-dev.yaml` — cluster URL, nodepool info

file.content:
# DefectDojo ApplicationSet
# Deploys DefectDojo Application Security Pipeline Platform for vulnerability management
# Uses multi-source pattern: Helm chart + values + additional manifests (SecretProviderClass)
# The DefectDojo Helm chart does not support extraObjects, so we use a 3rd source for CSI secrets
# Official Chart: https://github.com/DefectDojo/django-DefectDojo/tree/master/helm/defectdojo
# Documentation: https://documentation.defectdojo.com/
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ApplicationSet
metadata:
  name: defectdojo

  namespace: argocd
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: defectdojo
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: kube-addons
    app.kubernetes.io/component: security
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: argocd
    cafehyna.com.br/lifecycle: active
    cafehyna.com.br/managed-via: kustomization
  annotations:
    argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "0" # Default wave, adjust based on dependencies
    cafehyna.com.br/owner-team: platform-engineering
spec:
  syncPolicy:
    preserveResourcesOnDeletion: true
  generators:
    - list:
        elements:
          - cluster: cafehyna-dev

            url: https://aks-cafehyna-dev-hlg-q3oga63c.30041054-9b14-4852-9bd5-114d2fac4590.privatelink.eastus.azmk8s.io:443

            project: kube-addons

            branch: main

            environment: development

            urlSuffix: .dev

  template:
    metadata:
      name: "{{cluster}}-defectdojo"
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: defectdojo
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: "{{cluster}}-defectdojo"
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: "{{cluster}}-kube-addons"
        app.kubernetes.io/component: security
        app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: argocd
        app.kubernetes.io/version: 2.52.3

        environment: "{{environment}}"
        tier: security

      annotations:
        argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "0"
        # Workaround for ArgoCD issue #18778: podReplacementPolicy schema validation error
        # Server-Side Diff fails on K8s 1.29+ Job resources with fields not in ArgoCD's embedded schema
        # See: https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/issues/18778
        argocd.argoproj.io/compare-options: ServerSideDiff=false
        notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-health-degraded.slack: argocd-alerts
        notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-sync-failed.slack: argocd-alerts
    spec:
      revisionHistoryLimit: 10
      project: "{{project}}"
      sources:
        # Source 1: Helm chart from DefectDojo repository
        - chart: defectdojo
          repoURL: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DefectDojo/django-DefectDojo/helm-charts
          targetRevision: 1.8.3

          helm:
            releaseName: defectdojo
            valueFiles:
              - $values/argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/defectdojo/{{cluster}}/values.yaml
        # Source 2: Values from argocd repository
        - repoURL: https://hyperadevops@dev.azure.com/hyperadevops/devops-team/_git/argocd
          targetRevision: "{{branch}}"
          ref: values
        # Source 3: Additional manifests (SecretProviderClass for Azure Key Vault CSI)
        # Required because DefectDojo Helm chart does not support extraObjects
        - repoURL: https://hyperadevops@dev.azure.com/hyperadevops/devops-team/_git/argocd
          targetRevision: "{{branch}}"
          path: argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/defectdojo/{{cluster}}

          directory:
            exclude: values.yaml

      destination:
        server: "{{url}}"
        namespace: defectdojo

      info:
        - name: DefectDojo UI

          value: https://defectdojo{{urlSuffix}}.cafehyna.com.br

        - name: DefectDojo Dashboard

          value: https://{{cluster}}{{urlSuffix}}.grafana.cafehyna.com.br/d/defectdojo-django/defectdojo-django-application

        - name: Grafana

          value: https://{{cluster}}{{urlSuffix}}.grafana.cafehyna.com.br

        - name: Robusta Platform

          value: https://platform.robusta.dev/Hypera%20Pharma-Cafehyna

        - name: Chart Version

          value: 1.8.3

        - name: App Version

          value: 2.52.3

        - name: Documentation

          value: https://documentation.defectdojo.com/

      ignoreDifferences:
        # Ignore Job fields that cause SSA schema validation errors (K8s 1.29+ features)
        # These fields are dynamically set by the Job controller and not in Helm chart schemas
        - group: batch
          kind: Job
          jsonPointers:
            - /spec/podReplacementPolicy
            - /status/terminating
            - /spec/selector
            - /spec/template/metadata/labels/batch.kubernetes.io~1controller-uid
            - /spec/template/metadata/labels/controller-uid
        # Ignore HPA replica counts as they're managed by the autoscaler
        - group: autoscaling
          kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
          jsonPointers:
            - /spec/minReplicas
            - /spec/maxReplicas
        # Ignore dynamic deployment replica counts
        - group: apps
          kind: Deployment
          jsonPointers:
            - /spec/replicas
        # Ignore PVC status and capacity changes
        - group: ""
          kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
          jsonPointers:
            - /status
            - /spec/volumeName
            - /spec/resources/requests/storage
        # Ignore Service clusterIP as it's dynamically assigned
        - group: ""
          kind: Service
          jsonPointers:
            - /spec/clusterIP
            - /spec/clusterIPs
        # Ignore webhook certificates that are dynamically generated
        - group: admissionregistration.k8s.io
          kind: ValidatingWebhookConfiguration
          jsonPointers:
            - /webhooks/*/clientConfig/caBundle
        - group: admissionregistration.k8s.io
          kind: MutatingWebhookConfiguration
          jsonPointers:
            - /webhooks/*/clientConfig/caBundle
      syncPolicy:
        automated:
          prune: true
          selfHeal: true
          allowEmpty: false
        retry:
          limit: 5
          backoff:
            duration: 5s
            factor: 2
            maxDuration: 3m
        syncOptions:
          - ServerSideApply=true
          - PrunePropagationPolicy=Orphan # Changed from Foreground to prevent PVC deletion
          - PruneLast=true
          - Validate=true
          - ApplyOutOfSyncOnly=true
          - RespectIgnoreDifferences=true
          - PreserveResourcesOnDeletion=true # Preserve PVCs when app is deleted
        managedNamespaceMetadata:
          labels:
            managed-by: argocd
            purpose: security
          annotations:
            support-team: platform-engineering
            criticality: high

# SecretProviderClass for DefectDojo secrets from Azure Key Vault
# This resource is deployed separately because the DefectDojo
# Helm chart does not support extraObjects parameter
# Integrates with Azure Key Vault to securely provide application secrets
apiVersion: secrets-store.csi.x-k8s.io/v1
kind: SecretProviderClass
metadata:
  name: defectdojo-secrets
  namespace: defectdojo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: defectdojo
    app.kubernetes.io/component: secrets
  annotations:
    argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "-2"
spec:
  provider: azure
  parameters:
    usePodIdentity: "false"
    useVMManagedIdentity: "true"
    userAssignedIdentityID: "f1a14a8f-6d38-40a0-a935-3cdd91a25f47"
    keyvaultName: "kv-cafehyna-dev-hlg"
    cloudName: "AzurePublicCloud"
    tenantId: "3f7a3df4-f85b-4ca8-98d0-08b1034e6567"
    objects: |
      array:
        - |
          objectName: "defectdojo-admin-password"
          objectType: "secret"
          objectAlias: "DD_ADMIN_PASSWORD"
        - |
          objectName: "defectdojo-secret-key"
          objectType: "secret"
          objectAlias: "DD_SECRET_KEY"
        - |
          objectName: "defectdojo-credential-aes-key"
          objectType: "secret"
          objectAlias: "DD_CREDENTIAL_AES_256_KEY"
        - |
          objectName: "defectdojo-metrics-password"
          objectType: "secret"
          objectAlias: "METRICS_HTTP_AUTH_PASSWORD"
        - |
          objectName: "defectdojo-postgresql-password"
          objectType: "secret"
          objectAlias: "postgresql-password"
        - |
          objectName: "defectdojo-postgresql-postgres-password"
          objectType: "secret"
          objectAlias: "postgresql-postgres-password"
        - |
          objectName: "defectdojo-redis-password"
          objectType: "secret"
          objectAlias: "redis-password"
        # Azure AD SSO Client Secret
        - |
          objectName: "defectdojo-azuread-client-secret"
          objectType: "secret"
          objectAlias: "DD_SOCIAL_AUTH_AZUREAD_TENANT_OAUTH2_SECRET"
  secretObjects:
    # DefectDojo application secrets (chart expects 'defectdojo' secret name)
    - secretName: defectdojo
      type: Opaque
      data:
        - objectName: "DD_ADMIN_PASSWORD"
          key: "DD_ADMIN_PASSWORD"
        - objectName: "DD_SECRET_KEY"
          key: "DD_SECRET_KEY"
        - objectName: "DD_CREDENTIAL_AES_256_KEY"
          key: "DD_CREDENTIAL_AES_256_KEY"
        - objectName: "METRICS_HTTP_AUTH_PASSWORD"
          key: "METRICS_HTTP_AUTH_PASSWORD"
        # Azure AD SSO Client Secret
        - objectName: "DD_SOCIAL_AUTH_AZUREAD_TENANT_OAUTH2_SECRET"
          key: "DD_SOCIAL_AUTH_AZUREAD_TENANT_OAUTH2_SECRET"
    # PostgreSQL secrets (chart expects 'defectdojo-postgresql-specific' secret name)
    - secretName: defectdojo-postgresql-specific
      type: Opaque
      data:
        - objectName: "postgresql-password"
          key: "postgresql-password"
        - objectName: "postgresql-postgres-password"
          key: "postgresql-postgres-password"
    # Redis secrets (chart expects 'defectdojo-redis-specific' secret name)
    - secretName: defectdojo-redis-specific
      type: Opaque
      data:
        - objectName: "redis-password"
          key: "redis-password"

# DevPod Workspace Image
# Build: az acr build --registry cafehynadevhlg --image devpod-workspace:1.0.0 -f Dockerfile .
# Base: code-server (browser-based VS Code) with SSH and full DevOps toolstack
FROM codercom/code-server:latest

USER root

# Install system dependencies and SSH server
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    openssh-server \
    curl \
    wget \
    unzip \
    gnupg \
    lsb-release \
    ca-certificates \
    apt-transport-https \
    software-properties-common \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    python3-venv \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Configure SSH server (port 2222)
RUN mkdir -p /run/sshd && \
    sed -i 's/#Port 22/Port 2222/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && \
    sed -i 's/#PermitRootLogin prohibit-password/PermitRootLogin no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && \
    sed -i 's/#PasswordAuthentication yes/PasswordAuthentication yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && \
    echo "AllowUsers coder" >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config && \
    ssh-keygen -A

# Install Azure CLI
RUN curl -sL https://aka.ms/InstallAzureCLIDeb | bash

# Install kubectl
RUN curl -fsSL https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v1.31/deb/Release.key | gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/kubernetes-apt-keyring.gpg && \
    echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/kubernetes-apt-keyring.gpg] https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v1.31/deb/ /" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/kubernetes.list && \
    apt-get update && apt-get install -y kubectl && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Helm
RUN curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/helm/helm/main/scripts/get-helm-3 | bash

# Install Terraform
RUN wget -qO- https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com/gpg | gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg && \
    echo "deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg] https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com $(lsb_release -cs) main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/hashicorp.list && \
    apt-get update && apt-get install -y terraform && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install kustomize
RUN curl -s "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubernetes-sigs/kustomize/master/hack/install_kustomize.sh" | bash && \
    mv kustomize /usr/local/bin/

# Install k9s
RUN curl -fsSL https://github.com/derailed/k9s/releases/latest/download/k9s_Linux_amd64.tar.gz | tar xz -C /usr/local/bin k9s

# Install ArgoCD CLI
RUN curl -sSL -o /usr/local/bin/argocd https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/releases/latest/download/argocd-linux-amd64 && \
    chmod +x /usr/local/bin/argocd

# Install jq and yq
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y jq && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* && \
    curl -fsSL https://github.com/mikefarah/yq/releases/latest/download/yq_linux_amd64 -o /usr/local/bin/yq && \
    chmod +x /usr/local/bin/yq

# Install Node.js 22 and pre-commit
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y nodejs && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Claude Code globally
RUN npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code

# Install pre-commit
RUN pip3 install --break-system-packages pre-commit

# Install git (ensure latest)
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install VS Code extensions for code-server
USER coder
RUN code-server --install-extension redhat.vscode-yaml && \
    code-server --install-extension ms-kubernetes-tools.vscode-kubernetes-tools && \
    code-server --install-extension hashicorp.terraform && \
    code-server --install-extension ms-azuretools.vscode-docker

# Entrypoint: start SSH and code-server
USER root
COPY <<'ENTRYPOINT_SCRIPT' /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh
#!/bin/bash
set -e
# Start SSH daemon in background
/usr/sbin/sshd
# Start code-server as coder user
exec su - coder -c "code-server --bind-addr 0.0.0.0:8080 --auth password /home/coder/workspace"
ENTRYPOINT_SCRIPT
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh

EXPOSE 8080 2222

ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh"]

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: devpod-workspace
  namespace: devpod
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
    app.kubernetes.io/component: workspace
spec:
  replicas: 1
  strategy:
    type: Recreate
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
        app.kubernetes.io/component: workspace
    spec:
      tolerations:
        - key: kubernetes.azure.com/scalesetpriority
          operator: Equal
          value: "spot"
          effect: NoSchedule
        - key: "CriticalAddonsOnly"
          operator: "Exists"
          effect: "NoSchedule"
      affinity:
        nodeAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            - weight: 100
              preference:
                matchExpressions:
                  - key: kubernetes.azure.com/scalesetpriority
                    operator: In
                    values: ["spot"]
          requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            nodeSelectorTerms:
              - matchExpressions:
                  - key: agentpool
                    operator: In
                    values: ["cafedevspot"]
      containers:
        - name: code-server
          image: cafehynadevhlg.azurecr.io/devpod-workspace:1.0.0
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
            - name: ssh
              containerPort: 2222
          env:
            - name: TZ
              value: America/Sao_Paulo
            - name: PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: devpod-secrets
                  key: code-server-password
                  optional: true
            - name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: devpod-akv-secrets
                  key: anthropic-api-key
                  optional: true
          volumeMounts:
            - name: workspace
              mountPath: /home/coder/workspace
            - name: akv-secrets
              mountPath: /mnt/secrets-store
              readOnly: true
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "2"
              memory: 4Gi
            limits:
              cpu: "4"
              memory: 8Gi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 30
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
      volumes:
        - name: workspace
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: devpod-workspace
        - name: akv-secrets
          csi:
            driver: secrets-store.csi.k8s.io
            readOnly: true
            volumeAttributes:
              secretProviderClass: devpod-akv-secrets

                  key: code-server-password
                  optional: true
            - name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: devpod-akv-secrets
                  key: anthropic-api-key
                  optional: true
          volumeMounts:
            - name: workspace
              mountPath: /home/coder/workspace
            - name: akv-secrets
              mountPath: /mnt/secrets-store
              readOnly: true
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "2"
              memory: 4Gi
            limits:
              cpu: "4"
              memory: 8Gi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 30
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
      volumes:
        - name: workspace
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: devpod-workspace
        - name: akv-secrets
          csi:
            driver: secrets-store.csi.k8s.io
            readOnly: true
            volumeAttributes:
              secretProviderClass: devpod-akv-secrets

# DevPod ApplicationSet
# Deploys cloud-based development environment (code-server + SSH) with Claude Code
# Uses directory source pattern (raw manifests, no Helm chart)
# Access: https://devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br (web IDE) or SSH via port-forward
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ApplicationSet
metadata:
  name: devpod
  namespace: argocd
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: kube-addons
    app.kubernetes.io/component: developer-tools
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: argocd
    cafehyna.com.br/lifecycle: active
    cafehyna.com.br/managed-via: kustomization
  annotations:
    argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "5"
    cafehyna.com.br/owner-team: platform-engineering
spec:
  syncPolicy:
    preserveResourcesOnDeletion: true
  generators:
    - list:
        elements:
          - cluster: cafehyna-dev
            url: https://aks-cafehyna-dev-hlg-q3oga63c.30041054-9b14-4852-9bd5-114d2fac4590.privatelink.eastus.azmk8s.io:443
            project: kube-addons
            branch: main
            environment: development
            urlSuffix: .dev
  template:
    metadata:
      name: "{{cluster}}-devpod"
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: "{{cluster}}-devpod"
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: "{{cluster}}-kube-addons"
        app.kubernetes.io/component: developer-tools
        app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: argocd
        environment: "{{environment}}"
      annotations:
        argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "5"
        notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-health-degraded.slack: argocd-alerts
        notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-sync-failed.slack: argocd-alerts
    spec:
      revisionHistoryLimit: 10
      project: "{{project}}"
      sources:
        # Single source: raw manifests from directory
        - repoURL: https://hyperadevops@dev.azure.com/hyperadevops/devops-team/_git/argocd
          targetRevision: "{{branch}}"
          path: argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/{{cluster}}
          directory:
            exclude: "{Dockerfile,README.md,*.bak}"
      destination:
        server: "{{url}}"
        namespace: devpod
      info:
        - name: DevPod Web IDE
          value: https://devpod{{urlSuffix}}.cafehyna.com.br
        - name: SSH Access
          value: "kubectl port-forward -n devpod svc/devpod-ssh 2222:22"
        - name: Documentation
          value: https://coder.com/docs/code-server
      ignoreDifferences:
        - group: ""
          kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
          jsonPointers:
            - /status
            - /spec/volumeName
        - group: ""
          kind: Service
          jsonPointers:
            - /spec/clusterIP
            - /spec/clusterIPs
      syncPolicy:
        automated:
          prune: true
          selfHeal: true
          allowEmpty: false
        retry:
          limit: 5
          backoff:
            duration: 5s
            factor: 2
            maxDuration: 3m
        syncOptions:
          - ServerSideApply=true
          - PrunePropagationPolicy=Orphan
          - PruneLast=true
          - Validate=true
          - ApplyOutOfSyncOnly=true
          - RespectIgnoreDifferences=true
          - CreateNamespace=true
        managedNamespaceMetadata:
          labels:
            managed-by: argocd
            purpose: developer-tools
          annotations:
            support-team: platform-engineering
            criticality: medium

content.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: devpod-ssh
  namespace: devpod
spec:
  ports:
  - name: ssh
    port: 22
    targetPort: 2222
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: devpod-web
  namespace: devpod
spec:
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: devpod-workspace
  namespace: devpod
spec:
  accessModes:
  - ReadWriteOnce
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 50Gi
  storageClassName: managed-premium-zrs
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: workspace
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
  name: devpod-workspace
  namespace: devpod
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
  strategy:
    type: Recreate
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/component: workspace
        app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
    spec:
      affinity:
        nodeAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - preference:
              matchExpressions:
              - key: kubernetes.azure.com/scalesetpriority
                operator: In
                values:
                - spot
            weight: 100
          requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            nodeSelectorTerms:
            - matchExpressions:
              - key: agentpool
                operator: In
                values:
                - cafedevspot
      containers:
      - env:
        - name: TZ
          value: America/Sao_Paulo
        - name: PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: code-server-password
              name: devpod-secrets
              optional: true
        - name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: anthropic-api-key
              name: devpod-akv-secrets
              optional: true
        image: cafehynadevhlg.azurecr.io/devpod-workspace:1.0.0
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthz
            port: 8080

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: devpod-workspace
  namespace: devpod
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod

          effect: "NoSchedule"

content.text:
Now fix the secretproviderclass — but note the `usePodIdentity`, `useVMManagedIdentity` etc need quotes because they're string representations of booleans. Let me check what the existing defectdojo SPC uses.

The defectdojo SPC uses quotes for all parameter values (`"false"`, `"true"`, etc). These ARE necessary because CSI driver parameters must be strings. The yamllint rule flags them but they're semantically required. The `objectName`, `objectType`, `objectAlias` inside the `objects` block are inside a YAML literal block scalar (`|`), so they're just text — but the `secretObjects` section values need quotes removed.

# SecretProviderClass for DevPod secrets from Azure Key Vault
# Provides ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for Claude Code integration
apiVersion: secrets-store.csi.x-k8s.io/v1
kind: SecretProviderClass
metadata:
  name: devpod-akv-secrets
  namespace: devpod
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
    app.kubernetes.io/component: secrets
  annotations:
    argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "-2"
spec:
  provider: azure
  parameters:
    usePodIdentity: "false"
    useVMManagedIdentity: "true"
    userAssignedIdentityID: "f1a14a8f-6d38-40a0-a935-3cdd91a25f47"
    keyvaultName: "kv-cafehyna-dev-hlg"
    cloudName: "AzurePublicCloud"
    tenantId: "3f7a3df4-f85b-4ca8-98d0-08b1034e6567"
    objects: |
      array:
        - |
          objectName: "anthropic-api-key"
          objectType: "secret"
          objectAlias: "anthropic-api-key"
  secretObjects:
    - secretName: devpod-akv-secrets
      type: Opaque
      data:
        - objectName: "anthropic-api-key"
          key: "anthropic-api-key"

content.text: The yamllint errors on lines 18-21 and 32-33 are for the `parameters` and `secretObjects` values. The parameters need quotes for booleans-as-strings, but the other values like UUID, key vault name etc don't need quotes. Let me fix what can be fixed while keeping required quotes for booleans.

# DevPod ApplicationSet
# Deploys cloud-based development environment (code-server + SSH) with Claude Code
# Uses directory source pattern (raw manifests, no Helm chart)
# Access: https://devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br (web IDE) or SSH via port-forward
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ApplicationSet
metadata:
  name: devpod
  namespace: argocd
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: kube-addons
    app.kubernetes.io/component: developer-tools
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: argocd
    cafehyna.com.br/lifecycle: active
    cafehyna.com.br/managed-via: kustomization
  annotations:
    argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "5"
    cafehyna.com.br/owner-team: platform-engineering
spec:
  syncPolicy:
    preserveResourcesOnDeletion: true
  generators:
    - list:
        elements:
          - cluster: cafehyna-dev
            url: https://aks-cafehyna-dev-hlg-q3oga63c.30041054-9b14-4852-9bd5-114d2fac4590.privatelink.eastus.azmk8s.io:443
            project: kube-addons
            branch: main
            environment: development
            urlSuffix: .dev
  template:
    metadata:
      name: "{{cluster}}-devpod"
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: "{{cluster}}-devpod"
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: "{{cluster}}-kube-addons"
        app.kubernetes.io/component: developer-tools
        app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: argocd
        environment: "{{environment}}"
      annotations:
        argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "5"
        notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-health-degraded.slack: argocd-alerts
        notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-sync-failed.slack: argocd-alerts
    spec:
      revisionHistoryLimit: 10
      project: "{{project}}"
      sources:
        # Single source: raw manifests from directory
        - repoURL: https://hyperadevops@dev.azure.com/hyperadevops/devops-team/_git/argocd
          targetRevision: "{{branch}}"
          path: argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/{{cluster}}
          directory:
            exclude: "{Dockerfile,README.md,*.bak}"
      destination:
        server: "{{url}}"
        namespace: devpod
      info:
        - name: DevPod Web IDE
          value: https://devpod{{urlSuffix}}.cafehyna.com.br
        - name: SSH Access
          value: "kubectl port-forward -n devpod svc/devpod-ssh 2222:22"
        - name: Documentation
          value: https://coder.com/docs/code-server
      ignoreDifferences:
        - group: ""
          kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
          jsonPointers:
            - /status
            - /spec/volumeName
        - group: ""
          kind: Service
          jsonPointers:
            - /spec/clusterIP
            - /spec/clusterIPs
      syncPolicy:
        automated:
          prune: true
          selfHeal: true
          allowEmpty: false
        retry:
          limit: 5
          backoff:
            duration: 5s
            factor: 2
            maxDuration: 3m
        syncOptions:
          - ServerSideApply=true
          - PrunePropagationPolicy=Orphan
          - PruneLast=true
          - Validate=true
          - ApplyOutOfSyncOnly=true
          - RespectIgnoreDifferences=true
          - CreateNamespace=true
        managedNamespaceMetadata:
          labels:
            managed-by: argocd
            purpose: developer-tools
          annotations:
            support-team: platform-engineering
            criticality: medium

**Goal:** Document brownfield projects for AI context.

**Your Role:** Project documentation specialist.
- Communicate all responses in {communication_language}

---

## INITIALIZATION

### Configuration Loading

Load config from `{project-root}/_bmad/bmm/config.yaml` and resolve:

- `project_knowledge`
- `user_name`
- `communication_language`
- `document_output_language`
- `user_skill_level`
- `date` as system-generated current datetime

---

## EXECUTION

Read fully and follow: `./instructions.md`

# Document Project Workflow Router

<critical>Communicate all responses in {communication_language}</critical>

<workflow>

<critical>This router determines workflow mode and delegates to specialized sub-workflows</critical>

<step n="1" goal="Check for ability to resume and determine workflow mode">
<action>Check for existing state file at: {project_knowledge}/project-scan-report.json</action>

<check if="project-scan-report.json exists">
  <action>Read state file and extract: timestamps, mode, scan_level, current_step, completed_steps, project_classification</action>
  <action>Extract cached project_type_id(s) from state file if present</action>
  <action>Calculate age of state file (current time - last_updated)</action>

<ask>I found an in-progress workflow state from {{last_updated}}.

    **Current Progress:**

    - Mode: {{mode}}
    - Scan Level: {{scan_level}}
    - Completed Steps: {{completed_steps_count}}/{{total_steps}}
    - Last Step: {{current_step}}
    - Project Type(s): {{cached_project_types}}

    Would you like to:

    1. **Resume from where we left off** - Continue from step {{current_step}}
    2. **Start fresh** - Archive old state and begin new scan
    3. **Cancel** - Exit without changes

    Your choice [1/2/3]:
</ask>

  <check if="user selects 1">
    <action>Set resume_mode = true</action>
    <action>Set workflow_mode = {{mode}}</action>
    <action>Load findings summaries from state file</action>
    <action>Load cached project_type_id(s) from state file</action>

    <critical>CONDITIONAL CSV LOADING FOR RESUME:</critical>
    <action>For each cached project_type_id, load ONLY the corresponding row from: ./documentation-requirements.csv</action>
    <action>Skip loading project-types.csv and architecture_registry.csv (not needed on resume)</action>
    <action>Store loaded doc requirements for use in remaining steps</action>

    <action>Display: "Resuming {{workflow_mode}} from {{current_step}} with cached project type(s): {{cached_project_types}}"</action>

    <check if="workflow_mode == deep_dive">
      <action>Read fully and follow: ./workflows/deep-dive-workflow.md with resume context</action>
    </check>

    <check if="workflow_mode == initial_scan OR workflow_mode == full_rescan">
      <action>Read fully and follow: ./workflows/full-scan-workflow.md with resume context</action>
    </check>

  </check>

  <check if="user selects 2">
    <action>Create archive directory: {project_knowledge}/.archive/</action>
    <action>Move old state file to: {project_knowledge}/.archive/project-scan-report-{{timestamp}}.json</action>
    <action>Set resume_mode = false</action>
    <action>Continue to Step 0.5</action>
  </check>

  <check if="user selects 3">
    <action>Display: "Exiting workflow without changes."</action>
    <action>Exit workflow</action>
  </check>

  <check if="state file age >= 24 hours">
    <action>Display: "Found old state file (>24 hours). Starting fresh scan."</action>
    <action>Archive old state file to: {project_knowledge}/.archive/project-scan-report-{{timestamp}}.json</action>
    <action>Set resume_mode = false</action>
    <action>Continue to Step 0.5</action>
  </check>

</step>

<step n="3" goal="Check for existing documentation and determine workflow mode" if="resume_mode == false">
<action>Check if {project_knowledge}/index.md exists</action>

<check if="index.md exists">
  <action>Read existing index.md to extract metadata (date, project structure, parts count)</action>
  <action>Store as {{existing_doc_date}}, {{existing_structure}}</action>

<ask>I found existing documentation generated on {{existing_doc_date}}.

What would you like to do?

1. **Re-scan entire project** - Update all documentation with latest changes
2. **Deep-dive into specific area** - Generate detailed documentation for a particular feature/module/folder
3. **Cancel** - Keep existing documentation as-is

Your choice [1/2/3]:
</ask>

  <check if="user selects 1">
    <action>Set workflow_mode = "full_rescan"</action>
    <action>Display: "Starting full project rescan..."</action>
    <action>Read fully and follow: ./workflows/full-scan-workflow.md</action>
    <action>After sub-workflow completes, continue to Step 4</action>
  </check>

  <check if="user selects 2">
    <action>Set workflow_mode = "deep_dive"</action>
    <action>Set scan_level = "exhaustive"</action>
    <action>Display: "Starting deep-dive documentation mode..."</action>
    <action>Read fully and follow: ./workflows/deep-dive-workflow.md</action>
    <action>After sub-workflow completes, continue to Step 4</action>
  </check>

  <check if="user selects 3">
    <action>Display message: "Keeping existing documentation. Exiting workflow."</action>
    <action>Exit workflow</action>
  </check>
</check>

<check if="index.md does not exist">
  <action>Set workflow_mode = "initial_scan"</action>
  <action>Display: "No existing documentation found. Starting initial project scan..."</action>
  <action>Read fully and follow: ./workflows/full-scan-workflow.md</action>
  <action>After sub-workflow completes, continue to Step 4</action>
</check>

</step>

</workflow>

# DevPod Workspace Image
# Build: az acr build --registry cafehynadevhlg --image devpod-workspace:1.0.0 -f Dockerfile .
# Base: code-server (browser-based VS Code) with SSH and full DevOps toolstack
FROM codercom/code-server:latest

USER root

# Install system dependencies and SSH server
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    openssh-server \
    curl \
    wget \
    unzip \
    gnupg \
    lsb-release \
    ca-certificates \
    apt-transport-https \
    software-properties-common \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    python3-venv \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Configure SSH server (port 2222)
RUN mkdir -p /run/sshd && \
    sed -i 's/#Port 22/Port 2222/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && \
    sed -i 's/#PermitRootLogin prohibit-password/PermitRootLogin no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && \
    sed -i 's/#PasswordAuthentication yes/PasswordAuthentication yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && \
    echo "AllowUsers coder" >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config && \
    ssh-keygen -A

# Install Azure CLI
RUN curl -sL https://aka.ms/InstallAzureCLIDeb | bash

# Install kubectl
RUN curl -fsSL https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v1.31/deb/Release.key | gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/kubernetes-apt-keyring.gpg && \
    echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/kubernetes-apt-keyring.gpg] https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v1.31/deb/ /" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/kubernetes.list && \
    apt-get update && apt-get install -y kubectl && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Helm
RUN curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/helm/helm/main/scripts/get-helm-3 | bash

# Install Terraform
RUN wget -qO- https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com/gpg | gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg && \
    echo "deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg] https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com $(lsb_release -cs) main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/hashicorp.list && \
    apt-get update && apt-get install -y terraform && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install kustomize
RUN curl -s "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubernetes-sigs/kustomize/master/hack/install_kustomize.sh" | bash && \
    mv kustomize /usr/local/bin/

# Install k9s
RUN curl -fsSL https://github.com/derailed/k9s/releases/latest/download/k9s_Linux_amd64.tar.gz | tar xz -C /usr/local/bin k9s

# Install ArgoCD CLI
RUN curl -sSL -o /usr/local/bin/argocd https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/releases/latest/download/argocd-linux-amd64 && \
    chmod +x /usr/local/bin/argocd

# Install jq and yq
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y jq && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* && \
    curl -fsSL https://github.com/mikefarah/yq/releases/latest/download/yq_linux_amd64 -o /usr/local/bin/yq && \
    chmod +x /usr/local/bin/yq

# Install Node.js 22 and pre-commit
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y nodejs && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Claude Code globally
RUN npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code

# Install pre-commit
RUN pip3 install --break-system-packages pre-commit

# Install git (ensure latest)
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install VS Code extensions for code-server
USER coder
RUN code-server --install-extension redhat.vscode-yaml && \
    code-server --install-extension ms-kubernetes-tools.vscode-kubernetes-tools && \
    code-server --install-extension hashicorp.terraform && \
    code-server --install-extension ms-azuretools.vscode-docker

# Entrypoint: start SSH and code-server
USER root
COPY <<'ENTRYPOINT_SCRIPT' /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh
#!/bin/bash
set -e
# Start SSH daemon in background
/usr/sbin/sshd
# Start code-server as coder user
exec su - coder -c "code-server --bind-addr 0.0.0.0:8080 --auth password /home/coder/workspace"
ENTRYPOINT_SCRIPT
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh

EXPOSE 8080 2222

ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh"]

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: devpod-workspace
  namespace: devpod
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
    app.kubernetes.io/component: workspace
spec:
  replicas: 1
  strategy:
    type: Recreate
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
        app.kubernetes.io/component: workspace
    spec:
      tolerations:
        - key: kubernetes.azure.com/scalesetpriority
          operator: Equal
          value: spot
          effect: NoSchedule
        - key: CriticalAddonsOnly
          operator: Exists
          effect: NoSchedule
      affinity:
        nodeAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            - weight: 100
              preference:
                matchExpressions:
                  - key: kubernetes.azure.com/scalesetpriority
                    operator: In
                    values:
                      - spot
          requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            nodeSelectorTerms:
              - matchExpressions:
                  - key: agentpool
                    operator: In
                    values:
                      - cafedevspot
      containers:
        - name: code-server
          image: cafehynadevhlg.azurecr.io/devpod-workspace:1.0.0
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
            - name: ssh
              containerPort: 2222
          env:
            - name: TZ
              value: America/Sao_Paulo
            - name: PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: devpod-secrets
                  key: code-server-password
                  optional: true
            - name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: devpod-akv-secrets
                  key: anthropic-api-key
                  optional: true
          volumeMounts:
            - name: workspace
              mountPath: /home/coder/workspace
            - name: akv-secrets
              mountPath: /mnt/secrets-store
              readOnly: true
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "2"
              memory: 4Gi
            limits:
              cpu: "4"
              memory: 8Gi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 30
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
      volumes:
        - name: workspace
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: devpod-workspace
        - name: akv-secrets
          csi:
            driver: secrets-store.csi.k8s.io
            readOnly: true
            volumeAttributes:
              secretProviderClass: devpod-akv-secrets

file.content:
# Cafehyna Development Cluster (cafehyna-dev)

## Quick Reference

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Developer Name** | `cafehyna-dev` |
| **Azure Resource Name** | `aks-cafehyna-dev-hlg` |
| **Subscription** | hypera-pharma (`51f4e493-4815-4858-8bbb-f263e7fb63d6`) |
| **Resource Group** | `RS_Hypera_Cafehyna_Dev` |
| **Region** | East US |
| **Node Type** | Azure Spot Instances |
| **Kubeconfig** | `~/.kube/aks-rg-hypera-cafehyna-dev-config` |

## Cluster Details

- **Kubernetes API Server**: `aks-cafehyna-dev-hlg-q3oga63c.30041054-9b14-4852-9bd5-114d2fac4590.privatelink.eastus.azmk8s.io`
- **API Server Alias**: `cafehyna-dev-aks.eastus.cloudapp.azure.com`
- **Azure Key Vault**: `kv-cafehyna-dev-hlg`
- **Managed Identity (SystemAssigned)**: `fdc5f44a-6fba-498d-88dc-5c824e5b4e06`
- **Storage Class**: `managed-premium-zrs`
- **ClusterIssuer**: `letsencrypt-staging-cloudflare`

## Nodepools

| Nodepool | Taint | Purpose | Who Can Schedule |
|----------|-------|---------|------------------|
| `cafedev` | `CriticalAddonsOnly=true:NoSchedule` | System/critical components | Only pods with `CriticalAddonsOnly` toleration |
| `cafedevspot` | `kubernetes.azure.com/scalesetpriority=spot:NoSchedule` | Application workloads | Any pod with spot toleration |

> **IMPORTANT**: The `cafedev` nodepool is reserved for critical system addons (CoreDNS, kube-proxy, CNI, etc.). Regular application workloads **MUST** target only `cafedevspot`.

## Characteristics

- Cost-optimized using spot instances
- Suitable for non-critical workloads
- May experience node evictions
- Reduced resource allocations

## Spot Instance Configuration

**ALL application services deployed to this cluster MUST include spot instance tolerations AND node affinity targeting only `cafedevspot`:**

### Required Configuration for Application Workloads

```yaml
tolerations:
  - key: kubernetes.azure.com/scalesetpriority
    operator: Equal
    value: "spot"
    effect: NoSchedule

affinity:
  nodeAffinity:
    # Prefer spot nodes for cost optimization
    preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
      - weight: 100
        preference:
          matchExpressions:
            - key: kubernetes.azure.com/scalesetpriority
              operator: In
              values:
                - spot
    # IMPORTANT: Only target cafedevspot - cafedev has CriticalAddonsOnly taint
    requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
      nodeSelectorTerms:
        - matchExpressions:
            - key: agentpool
              operator: In
              values:
                - cafedevspot
```

### Configuration for Critical System Addons Only

```yaml
# ONLY use this for critical system components (CoreDNS, kube-proxy, CNI, etc.)
tolerations:
  - key: CriticalAddonsOnly
    operator: Equal
    value: "true"
    effect: NoSchedule
  - key: kubernetes.azure.com/scalesetpriority
    operator: Equal
    value: "spot"
    effect: NoSchedule

affinity:
  nodeAffinity:
    requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
      nodeSelectorTerms:
        - matchExpressions:
            - key: agentpool
              operator: In
              values:
                - cafedev
                - cafedevspot
```

> **Why only `cafedevspot` for applications?** The `cafedev` nodepool has the `CriticalAddonsOnly=true:NoSchedule` taint, which prevents regular application pods from scheduling there.

## Services Deployed

- ArgoCD (GitOps controller)
- Prometheus & Grafana (monitoring)
- Loki & Promtail (logging)
- Cert-Manager (certificate management)
- External-DNS (DNS management)
- Ingress-NGINX (ingress controller)

## Access Commands

```bash
# Get credentials
az aks get-credentials \
  --resource-group RS_Hypera_Cafehyna_Dev \
  --name aks-cafehyna-dev-hlg \
  --file ~/.kube/aks-rg-hypera-cafehyna-dev-config \
  --overwrite-existing

# Connect to cluster
kubectl --kubeconfig ~/.kube/aks-rg-hypera-cafehyna-dev-config get nodes

# Check spot node status
kubectl --kubeconfig ~/.kube/aks-rg-hypera-cafehyna-dev-config get nodes -l kubernetes.azure.com/scalesetpriority=spot

# Monitor spot node evictions
kubectl --kubeconfig ~/.kube/aks-rg-hypera-cafehyna-dev-config get events -A | grep -i evict
```

## Ingress Configuration

- **Ingress Class**: `nginx`
- **SSL**: Let's Encrypt Staging
- **Domain**: `*.dev.cafehyna.com.br`

## Resource Recommendations

```yaml
resources:
  requests:
    cpu: 50m-200m      # MUST be defined
    memory: 128Mi      # MUST equal limits.memory
  limits:
    # cpu: REMOVED    # MUST NOT be defined
    memory: 128Mi      # MUST equal requests.memory (range: 64Mi-512Mi)
```

- [Storage Configuration](../storage/managed-premium-zrs.md)
- [Access & Authentication](../operations/access-authentication.md)
- [Troubleshooting](../operations/troubleshooting.md)

# Kubernetes Clusters Documentation

## IMPORTANT NOTICE FOR AI/LLM AGENTS

> **CRITICAL**: This documentation contains a naming convention that MUST be respected:
>
> The **Hub Cluster** has TWO different names:
> - **Developer Name**: `cafehyna-hub` (used in team communication, documentation, and scripts)
> - **Azure Resource Name**: `aks-cafehyna-default` (the actual name in Azure)
>
> **RULES FOR AI AGENTS**:
> 1. When talking to developers: Use `cafehyna-hub`
> 2. When executing Azure CLI commands: Use `aks-cafehyna-default`
> 3. When writing scripts: Handle both names gracefully
> 4. Always clarify which name you're using if there's any ambiguity

## Overview

The Hypera project infrastructure operates across multiple Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) clusters, each serving specific purposes in the GitOps deployment pipeline. All clusters are managed through ArgoCD ApplicationSets for consistent and automated deployments.

## Quick Reference Table

| Environment | Developer Name | Azure Resource Name | Subscription | Node Type | Region | Cluster Details |
|-------------|----------------|---------------------|--------------|-----------|--------|-----------------|
| Cafehyna Dev | cafehyna-dev | aks-cafehyna-dev-hlg | hypera-pharma | Spot | East US | [Details](./clusters/cafehyna-dev.md) |
| Cafehyna Hub | cafehyna-hub | aks-cafehyna-default | hypera-pharma | Standard | East US | [Details](./clusters/cafehyna-hub.md) |
| Cafehyna Prd | cafehyna-prd | aks-cafehyna-prd | hypera-pharma | Standard | East US | [Details](./clusters/cafehyna-prd.md) |
| Loyalty Dev | loyalty-dev | Loyalty_AKS-QAS | hypera-pharma | Spot | East US | [Details](./clusters/loyalty-dev.md) |
| Loyalty Prd | loyalty-prd | Loyalty_AKS-PRD | hypera-pharma | Standard | East US | [Details](./clusters/loyalty-prd.md) |
| Sonora Dev | sonora-dev | AKS-Hypera-Sonora-Dev-Hlg | hypera-pharma | Spot | East US | [Details](./clusters/sonora-dev.md) |
| Sonora Prd | sonora-prd | AKS-Hypera-Sonora-Prod | hypera-pharma | Standard | East US | [Details](./clusters/sonora-prd.md) |
| Painel Clientes Dev | painelclientes-dev | akspainelclientedev | operation-dev | Spot | East US2 | [Details](./clusters/painelclientes-dev.md) |
| Painel Clientes Prd | painelclientes-prd | akspainelclientesprd | operation | Standard | East US2 | [Details](./clusters/painelclientes-prd.md) |

## Azure Subscriptions

| Subscription Name | Subscription ID | Clusters |
|-------------------|-----------------|----------|
| **hypera-pharma** | `51f4e493-4815-4858-8bbb-f263e7fb63d6` | cafehyna-dev, cafehyna-hub, cafehyna-prd, loyalty-dev, loyalty-prd, sonora-dev, sonora-prd |
| **operation-dev** | `56bb103c-1075-4536-b6fc-abf6df80b15c` | painelclientes-dev |
| **operation** | `1e705d23-900f-471e-b18d-7e0eb94d8c7a` | painelclientes-prd |

## Kubeconfig Files Reference

| Developer Name | Kubeconfig File |
|----------------|-----------------|
| cafehyna-dev | `~/.kube/aks-rg-hypera-cafehyna-dev-config` |
| cafehyna-hub | `~/.kube/aks-rg-hypera-cafehyna-hub-config` |
| cafehyna-prd | `~/.kube/aks-rg-hypera-cafehyna-prd-config` |
| loyalty-dev | `~/.kube/aks-rg-hypera-loyalty-dev-config` |
| loyalty-prd | `~/.kube/aks-rg-hypera-loyalty-prd-config` |
| sonora-dev | `~/.kube/aks-rg-hypera-sonora-dev-config` |
| sonora-prd | `~/.kube/aks-rg-hypera-sonora-prd-config` |
| painelclientes-dev | `~/.kube/aks-rg-hypera-painelclientes-dev-config` |
| painelclientes-prd | `~/.kube/aks-rg-hypera-painelclientes-prd-config` |

## Cluster Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    AKS Cluster Architecture                  │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                             │
│  ┌─────────────────┐  ┌─────────────────┐  ┌─────────────┐ │
│  │   DEV Cluster   │  │   HUB Cluster   │  │  PRD Cluster│ │
│  │                 │  │                 │  │             │ │
│  │ ┌─────────────┐ │  │ ┌─────────────┐ │  │ ┌─────────┐ │ │
│  │ │ Spot Nodes  │ │  │ │Standard Node│ │  │ │Standard │ │ │
│  │ │             │ │  │ │             │ │  │ │  Nodes  │ │ │
│  │ └─────────────┘ │  │ └─────────────┘ │  │ └─────────┘ │ │
│  │                 │  │                 │  │             │ │
│  │ • Development   │  │ • ArgoCD       │  │ • Production│ │
│  │ • Testing       │  │ • Monitoring   │  │ • Customer  │ │
│  │ • Feature       │  │ • Logging      │  │   Facing    │ │
│  │   Branches      │  │ • Shared Tools │  │ • HA Config │ │
│  └─────────────────┘  └─────────────────┘  └─────────────┘ │
│                                                             │
│                         Managed by                          │
│                     ArgoCD (Hub Cluster)                    │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Resource Definition Enforcement (MANDATORY)

**ALL containers deployed to ANY cluster MUST comply with these requirements:**

### CPU Resources
- ✅ **MUST** define CPU requests for every container
- ❌ **MUST NOT** define CPU limits

### Memory Resources
- ✅ **MUST** define memory requests for every container
- ✅ **MUST** define memory limits equal to memory requests

**Reference**: [Robusta.dev - Stop Using CPU Limits](https://home.robusta.dev/blog/stop-using-cpu-limits)

## Certificate Manager Configuration

All clusters use **cert-manager** with **Cloudflare DNS-01 challenges** for TLS certificates.

| Environment Type | Required ClusterIssuer |
|------------------|----------------------|
| **Production** | `letsencrypt-prod-cloudflare` |
| **Development** | `letsencrypt-staging-cloudflare` |

**Comprehensive Documentation**: [Cluster-Specific ClusterIssuer Reference](./cert-manager/cluster-clusterissuer-reference.md)

## Detailed Documentation

### Cluster-Specific Documentation

- [Cafehyna Dev Cluster](./clusters/cafehyna-dev.md) - Development with spot instances
- [Cafehyna Hub Cluster](./clusters/cafehyna-hub.md) - Shared services (ArgoCD, monitoring)
- [Cafehyna Prd Cluster](./clusters/cafehyna-prd.md) - Production workloads
- [Loyalty Dev Cluster](./clusters/loyalty-dev.md) - Loyalty development
- [Loyalty Prd Cluster](./clusters/loyalty-prd.md) - Loyalty production
- [Sonora Dev Cluster](./clusters/sonora-dev.md) - Sonora development
- [Sonora Prd Cluster](./clusters/sonora-prd.md) - Sonora production
- [Painel Clientes Dev Cluster](./clusters/painelclientes-dev.md) - Painel Clientes development
- [Painel Clientes Prd Cluster](./clusters/painelclientes-prd.md) - Painel Clientes production

### Operations Guides

- [Access & Authentication Guide](./operations/access-authentication.md) - kubectl access, kubeconfig, security
- [Troubleshooting Guide](./operations/troubleshooting.md) - Common issues and solutions

### Storage Configuration

- [Storage Class: managed-premium-zrs](./storage/managed-premium-zrs.md) - Zone-redundant storage

## Deployment Strategy

### Progressive Deployment Order

1. **Development** → Test and validate
2. **Hub** → Deploy shared services
3. **Production** → Final deployment

### ApplicationSet Configuration

```yaml
generators:
  - list:
      elements:
        - cluster: dev
          url: aks-cafehyna-dev-hlg-q3oga63c.30041054-9b14-4852-9bd5-114d2fac4590.privatelink.eastus.azmk8s.io:443
        - cluster: hub
          url: aks-cafehyna-default-b2ie56p8.5bbf1042-d320-432c-bd11-cea99f009c29.privatelink.eastus.azmk8s.io:443
        - cluster: prd
          url: aks-cafehyna-prd-hsr83z2k.c7d864af-cbd7-481b-866b-8559e0d1c1ea.privatelink.eastus.azmk8s.io:443
```

## Monitoring and Observability

- **Prometheus**: Deployed in hub cluster with remote write from all clusters
- **Loki**: Centralized log aggregation in hub cluster
- **Grafana**: Unified dashboards for all environments
- **AlertManager**: Environment-specific alert routing

**Web UI Access**: See [Robusta Web UI Access Configuration](./robusta/robusta-reference.md#web-ui-access-configuration)

## Backup & Recovery

| Environment | Backup Frequency | Retention | RTO | RPO |
|-------------|------------------|-----------|-----|-----|
| Dev | Daily | 7 days | 4 hours | 24 hours |
| Hub | Hourly | 30 days | 2 hours | 4 hours |
| Prd | Continuous | 90 days | 1 hour | 1 hour |

## Maintenance Windows

| Environment | Schedule | Approval |
|-------------|----------|----------|
| Dev | Anytime (with notification) | None |
| Hub | Weekends, 2 AM - 6 AM EST | Platform team |
| Prd | Sundays, 2 AM - 4 AM EST | Required |

## References

### Official Documentation

- [Azure AKS Documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/aks/)
- [AKS Best Practices](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/aks/best-practices)
- [AKS Private Clusters](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/aks/private-clusters)
- [AKS Spot Node Pools](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/aks/spot-node-pool)

- [Taints and Tolerations](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/taint-and-toleration/)

### GitOps & ArgoCD

- [ArgoCD Multi-Cluster](https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/operator-manual/declarative-setup/#clusters)
- [ArgoCD ApplicationSets](https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/user-guide/application-set/)
